name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Apple Mail MCP server — 44+ tools, reply-as-draft + IDD task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace (shell v2.10.2, binary v2.5.0)。Shell v2.10.2: 通知 binary v2.5.0 修正 reply_email plain mode 終於把 quoted original 嵌入 draft body (issue #43)。RFC 3676 `> ` prefix + CRLF normalization + 空行 stuffing + pre-fetch graceful degrade。疊加 v2.4.1 save_as_draft 不彈視窗、v2.4.0 reply-as-draft、v2.9.0 task enforcement、v2.8.0 namespace、v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation。
